_doc: Project-level Claude Code settings for the claude-tdd-pro plugin. Travels into every session opened on this repo, including cloud Claude Code at claude.ai/code. Personal additions go in .claude/settings.local.json (gitignored).
_model_doc: Plugin development is substrate-write-heavy; opus reasoning depth matches the per-CL pre-flight + audit discipline in CLAUDE.md. Override per-session via /model.
_marketplace_doc: Declares the anthropic-skills marketplace so cloud sessions can install covenant-genesis-protocol-for-cl (and other anthropic-skills) on first use. Per the project's governance posture, install with: /plugin install anthropic-skills@claude-plugins-official

permissions._doc: Conservative allowlist: read-only git / filesystem inspection, the plugin's own runner + detectors, and the standard substrate-write loop. Anything not listed prompts. Add personal exceptions to .claude/settings.local.json.

hooks._doc: Hook wiring lives in hooks/hooks.json (plugin-shipped). The Setup hook auto-runs sync-memory.sh and verify-deps.sh on session start so docs/memory/ mirrors into the per-user auto-memory tree and missing dependencies are surfaced immediately.
